keyFindings.description: No unit tests for the new directory scan code path. Parent issue #468 explicitly required tests in packages/daemon/src/daemon/__tests__/. Existing auto-cleanup tests don't inject a mock listDir, so the new logic is never exercised.
if (listDir) guard is dead code — defaultRepoManagerDeps.listDir is always defined, so the ?? fallback always resolves to a function.
Duplicate open PR: #474 (fix/listdir-fallback) points to the same commit as #475. PR #474 should be closed.
